zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Guildford於1455年出生在英國素可格盧布利其時，他的父親Sir John Guildford35歲，母親Alice Waller21歲。他於大約1473年與Anne Pympe在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年9月6日在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年51歲，埋葬在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם可盧薩迪 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Guildford于1455年出生在英国素可格盧布利其时，他的父亲Sir John Guildford35岁，母亲Alice Waller21岁。他于大约1473年与Anne Pympe在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年9月6日在巴勒斯坦巴勒斯坦耶路撒冷享年51岁，埋葬在以色列מחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִם可盧薩迪 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Guildford
meanings: Gild-ford, from gild, a guild, society, or club where money was paid for support, and ford, a ford, meaning a stock ford

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Guildford was born in 1455, in Groombridge, Sussex, England, his father, Sir John Guildford, was 35 and his mother, Alice Waller, was 21. He married Anne Pympe about 1473, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 6 September 1506, in Jerusalem, West Bank, Palestine, at the age of 51, and was buried in Crusader Cemetery, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Guildford est né en 1455, à Groombridge, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Guildford, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice Waller, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Anne Pympe environ 1473, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 6 septembre 1506, à Jerusalem, Cisjordanie, Palestine, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Crusader Cemetery, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israël.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Guildford 1455 in Groombridge, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Guildford 35 und seine Mutter Alice Waller 21. Er hat um 1473 in England Anne Pympe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 6. September 1506 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Jerusalem, Westjordanland, Palästina und wurde in Crusader Cemetery, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Guildford è nato il nel 1455 nel Groombridge, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Sir John Guildford, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alice Waller, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Anne Pympe circa 1473, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 6 settembre 1506, nel Jerusalem, Cisgiordania, Palestina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Crusader Cemetery, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israele.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Guildfordが1455年にイギリススセックスグルーンブリッジで生まれた時，父Sir John Guildfordは35歳，母Alice Wallerは21歳であった。約1473年にイギリスでAnne Pympeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年9月6日にパレスチナヨルダン川西岸地区ジャーウサレムで51歳で死去し，イスラエルמחוז ירושליםיְרוּשָׁלַיִםクルサダー セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Guildford(이)가 1455년 영국 수세스 그룸브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Guildford(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Waller(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1473년 영국에서 Anne Pympe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 9월 6일 팔레스타인 팔레스타인 제루사렘에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 이스라엘 מחוז ירושלים יְרוּשָׁלַיִם 크루세더 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Guildford nasceu em 1455, em Groombridge, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Guildford, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice Waller, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Pympe aproximadamente 1473, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1506, em Jerusalem, Cisjordânia, Palestina, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Crusader Cemetery, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.

ru.Crusader Cemetery, Jerusalem: крусадир кеметири, יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Guildford родился в 1455 г. в местности грумбридж, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Guildford было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Waller, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Pympe около 1473 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 6 сентября 1506 г. в местности джирсеилем, Западный берег реки Иордан, Палестина в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности крусадир кеметири, יְרוּשָׁלַיִם, מחוז ירושלים, Израиль.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Guildford nació en 1455, en Groombridge, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Guildford, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice Waller, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Anne Pympe aproximadamente 1473, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1506, en Jerusalem, Cisjordania, Palestina, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Crusader Cemetery, Jerusalem, Jerusalem, Israel.
